commit_scope: Move the centered-discernment practice into runnable Form and record the resulting substrate cells, witness stream, and ledger proof.

commands: python3 scripts/run_form_practice.py --form docs/coherence-substrate/centered-discernment-practice.form --practice centered_discernment --presence life-sub-agent --task centered-discernment-practice --marker centered-discernment-practice --source-url "https://youtu.be/KFaU6qR_iPg?si=LzzMcKcOY5mfThCf" --ledger docs/system_audit/substrate_centered_discernment_2026-05-18.jsonl --json
git stash push -u -m pre-rebase-substrate-centered-discernment && git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main && git stash pop
local_validation.summary: Prompt guide and wellness passed. The YouTube caption stream was fetched as testimony input. The centered discernment practice now lives as Form source, while the reusable Form practice runner executes any marked Form recipe, interns a recipe, creates one presence cell, one task cell, witness cells, and writes JSONL ledger proof. Focused test passes.

deploy_validation.details: No deploy attempted; this change adds a local substrate practice artifact and focused test.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Running the centered-discernment practice uses Form as the practice code and records named substrate cells plus ledger entries from the resulting stream.
test_flows: Generic Form practice runner loads the marked recipe from docs/coherence-substrate/centered-discernment-practice.form.
Form runtime returns the centered testimony stream.
Practice execution records presence, task, witness cells, and completion ledger proof.

phase_gate.reason: Focused local proof is complete; PR CI and deploy validation remain pending.
